start.text: Hi... how are you feeling today?

options.response: ...Oh. I see. I'll just rest then.
Thank you for asking... my back has been hurting and no one told me my results.

followup.text: I've been here three days and feeling quite lost. It means a lot that you asked.

options.text: I'll look into your results right away.
options.response: Thank you, nurse. I feel better already.

options.text: I'll let the doctor know about the pain.
options.response: Please. I don't want to complain but it's really affecting my sleep.

end_warm.text: Thank you, nurse. Knowing someone is looking out for me... it makes a difference.

options.response: Yes, yes. Off you go now.
